channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: News Corp's editorial abuse tactics and long-term vendettas revealed in new book
item.description: The article discusses the book 'Getting Murdoched,' which examines 50 cases of individuals targeted by Rupert Murdoch's media outlets for editorial abuse. The authors, Andrew Dodd and Matthew Ricketso...

item.title: Baringo family and school honour teacher after 39 years of service with emotional retirement celebration
item.description: A touching celebration was held in Baringo County for Milkah Amdany, a dedicated teacher who retired after serving for nearly 39 years at Seguton Comprehensive School. Her long career in education cam...

item.title: Prince Harry to Avoid London Visit with Meghan and Children After Police Protection Request Denied
item.description: The article discusses Prince Harry's decision to not bring Meghan Markle and their children to London upon his arrival in the UK on Monday, following the denial of a request for police protection. Thi...

item.title: FSF Updates LibrePhone Project and Introduces Automated Monitoring Tool
item.description: The Free Software Foundation (FSF) has shared updates on its LibrePhone project, which aims to reverse-engineer proprietary firmware in Android devices. The initiative focuses on analyzing radio blobs...

item.title: Trump's administration considers restricting foreign pregnant women from entering the US for birth tourism
item.description: The Trump administration is considering new restrictions to prevent pregnant foreign women from entering the US primarily to give birth and secure citizenship for their children. This follows the Supr...

item.title: Yas Promotes Digital Services in Tanzania with App Campaign
item.description: Tanzanian telecommunications provider Yas has launched a three-month promotional campaign aimed at increasing adoption of its mobile application. The initiative, called 'Register, Login and Win,' offe...

item.title: Two motorcycle riders killed in gun attack in Pikit, Cotabato
item.description: Two men riding a motorcycle were killed after being attacked by unidentified assailants in Pikit, Cotabato, on Friday, according to local authorities. The victims were identified as Badruddin Nunungan...

item.title: Veteran linebacker Wynton McManis returns to Hamilton Tiger-Cats after injury
item.description: Wynton McManis, a veteran middle linebacker, is set to make his debut with the Hamilton Tiger-Cats after recovering from a bone bruise in his knee. The 31-year-old joined the team as a free agent foll...

item.title: Alex Eala Advances to Wimbledon Round of 16 After Defeating Iga Swiatek
item.description: Philippine tennis star Alex Eala made history by defeating reigning Wimbledon champion Iga Swiatek in a thrilling third-round match at the 2026 Wimbledon Championships. The 21-year-old Eala, who had p...

item.title: Stephen Miller faces backlash after attributing Trump’s presidency to divine providence
item.description: White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller sparked widespread criticism after posting comments praising President Donald Trump in religious terms. In a message shared on the social media platfor...

item.title: Taylor Swift's Wedding Sparks Debate as Potential Mega-Event Outshines Met Gala
item.description: The article discusses the unprecedented scale and grandeur of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding, which has surpassed traditional high-profile events like the Met Gala in terms of media attention...

item.title: Mayor Apologizes for Racist Comments on Indigenous Evacuees
item.description: Over 1,100 residents from Kashechewan First Nation, displaced due to water infrastructure failures in January 2026, have been staying in hotel rooms in Niagara Falls, Ontario. Recent controversy erupt...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns secure Siyanda Ndlovu transfer as Chiefs target Renaldo Leaner
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns have finalized the signing of Siyanda Ndlovu from Orlando Pirates, securing the attacking midfielder after a last-minute twist in the transfer saga. Ndlovu, 25, was initially linked ...

item.title: Reduced Sitting Improves Insulin Sensitivity in Postmenopausal Women
item.description: A study published in Diabetologia (2021) investigated the effects of reducing sedentary behavior on metabolic health in postmenopausal women. The research found that minimizing prolonged sitting perio...

item.title: Midjourney Seeks Transparency from Hollywood Studios Over AI Usage
item.description: Midjourney, an AI startup, is engaged in a legal dispute with three major Hollywood studios—Disney, Universal, and Warner Bros.—over allegations of copyright infringement. The conflict began when thes...

item.title: Biffy Clyro Collaborate with Jamie Campbell Bower During Finsbury Park Concert
item.description: Biffy Clyro delivered a historic performance at Finsbury Park, marking their biggest headline show to date. The Scottish band invited 'Stranger Things' actor Jamie Campbell Bower to join them onstage ...

item.title: Tanzania's Participation in U.S. Health Strategy Raises Data Sovereignty Concerns
item.description: Tanzania has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the United States under the America First Global Health Strategy (AFGHS), a bilateral initiative aimed at strengthening the country's healt...

item.title: Kebbi Governor Inaugurates New Governing Council for AFUSTA University
item.description: Kebbi State Governor, Nasir Idris, officially launched the newly formed Governing Council of Abdullahi Fodio University of Science and Technology (AFUSTA) following a major restructuring that led to t...

item.title: Child Abuse Allegations in Bengaluru Daycare Center
item.description: Recent allegations of child abuse at a daycare center in Bengaluru have sparked widespread concern and calls for immediate investigations. The incident, which involves multiple children reportedly sub...

item.title: Preston weather update: Crawler access issues and troubleshooting steps
